rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MANUELA MESA MARTIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Impose Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Douglas Mesa Campbell's Motion to Compel Responses to Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production of Documents and for Sanctions against Richard S. Martin is GRANTED. Richard S. Martin shall respond to Respondent's Special Interrogatories, Set One and Request for Production of Documents, Set One not later than March 9, 2011. Richard S. Martin shall pay sanctions in the amount of $1,242.50 to Respondent Douglas Mesa Campbell. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the Probate Department Clerk at (415) 551-3702 no later than 4:00 p.m. on Tuesday, February 8, 2011 of his intention to appear and contest the ruling. If there is no appearance, the tentative will become the order of the court.
